Removed_Other.purpose: Provides players with a more tailored and enjoyable entry point to games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppChatReloadMessagesOnTrustedConnectionRTN_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows chat messages to refresh automatically when a trusted connection is established.
Added_Other.purpose: Keeps chat conversations up-to-date without needing to refresh manually.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePacksFallbackReferenceManaged_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Allows the system to revert to a default texture pack if a custom one fails to load.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures players always see textures, improving visual consistency even if custom assets are unavailable.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePriorityBasedOnDistance_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Adjusts texture quality based on how far away objects are.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Optimizes graphics to enhance visual quality without sacrificing performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Dynamically retrieves the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and updates, ensuring a smoother experience for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how timestamps are displayed in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures accurate and user-friendly time displays in games.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagExplorerStreaming3
Changed_Other.mechanism: Implements a new method for loading game assets dynamically.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves performance by streaming assets as needed.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for repository versioning.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance in version tracking for developers.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves how timestamps are formatted and displayed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides players with faster and clearer time displays in the game.
